name: Winlogon Helper DLL Persistence
description: Detects modification of Winlogon registry keys for persistence
query:
// Detect Winlogon registry modifications
// Trigger on changes to Shell, Userinit, or Notify keys
events from endpoint
where event_type = "registry_write"
  and registry_key matches "(?i)Winlogon\\(Shell|Userinit|Notify|Taskman)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
